title: Design an LRU Cache
statementMd:
Design a cache with a fixed `capacity` that evicts the least recently used entry.

- `get(key)` — return the value for `key`, or `-1` if absent. A successful get counts as a use.
- `put(key, value)` — insert or update. If the cache is over capacity, evict the least recently used key. A put counts as a use.
hints: You need O(1) lookup and O(1) recency updates.
Insertion-ordered maps make "least recently used" the first key.
Both get and put count as a use — move the key to most-recently-used.
